changeReason: English translation was missing; ENG field contained untranslated Japanese text.

TextENGNew: ``Mion, can I ask you something?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hmm? What is it, Kei-chan? You sound so formal.@k@vS20/03/440300155. What's up?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Well, actually,@k@vS20/01/440100168. ...it's about this guy called Satoshi.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The instant she heard that name, Mion's joking expression vanished. She drew a sharp breath, her complexion changing so dramatically it startled me.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Then, as if jolted, she whipped around to look at Satoko and the others, who were chatting away behind us.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``? Is something wrong, Mion-san?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Nah~ I just felt this weird presence behind me.@k@vS20/03/440300157. Maybe Satoko's cooking up some kind of scheme, I thought~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...What an unfair thing to say.@k@vS20/04/440400119. I'll have you know I'm not so idle that I spend every waking moment plotting to ensnare someone.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``That's right.@k@vS20/05/440500078. We were discussing what kind of trap to set for Keiichi's welcome tomorrow morning.@k@vS20/05/440500079. Nipah~♪``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Wait, hold on--those two had been conspiring about something that ominous?! Hearing that, I was about to step forward and dish out some corrective discipline to put a stop to their plotting, but--
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Now, now.@k@vS20/03/440300159. --Anyway, Kei-chan, you're free right now, right?@k@vS20/03/440300160. Come with me to the staff room for a sec.@k@vS20/03/440300161. There are a lot of handouts to pass around after school today~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh? Oh, uh... sure...?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Mion swiftly cut in front of me, blocking my path, and said that in a breezy tone, giving my shoulder a casual tap.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I immediately recognized it as a pretext to get me out of the classroom... but from an angle hidden from Satoko and the others, Mion's face showed an expression at odds with her cheerful voice--sharp and severe.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...What's going on, Mion?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Listen, Kei-chan.@k@vS20/03/440300163. ...That name you mentioned--who told you about it?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Who told me? Well...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The moment we stepped into the hallway, Mion pressed me as though interrogating a suspect, her expression and tone rigid. ...She was clearly not herself.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Come on, be honest. I won't get mad.@k@vS20/03/440300165. ...Who was it?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``N-Nobody told me, really.@k@vS20/01/440100173. ...Remember the detective card game we played in club?@k@vS20/01/440100174. There was a name I didn't recognize among ours, so I was just curious.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Oh, right.@k@vS20/03/440300167. That one was still left over from before...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Hearing that, Mion clutched her head with a look of genuine regret, as if thinking 'I should have caught that...'
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I didn't understand. ...Was the name 'Satoshi' really something so forbidden?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``No, it's not like that.@k@vS20/03/440300169. ...Actually, just between us--Satoshi is Satoko's older brother.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Wait, ...Satoko has a brother?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Yeah.@k@vS20/03/440300171. ...Or rather, I should say 'had.'@k@vS20/03/440300172. He's been... missing since last year.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I almost blurted it out, and Mion quickly raised a finger to her lips.@k ...Fortunately, we had moved far enough from the classroom that our voices probably hadn't carried inside.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Keep your voice down, Kei-chan.@k@vS20/03/440300175. Think about Satoko's feelings.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Sorry... I'll be careful.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Whether it was a runaway or a crime,@k@vS20/03/440300177. ...honestly, we don't know either.@k@vS20/03/440300178. But even though Satoko never talks about it, she cares about it deeply.@k@vS20/03/440300179. Satoshi and Satoko were incredibly close siblings.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Is that so...?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``So please don't bring up that name around her.@k@vS20/03/440300181. And to be honest, we haven't fully come to terms with it ourselves, so...@k@vS20/03/440300182. --Please.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh, okay...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Mion's words carried less the weight of a request than a veiled threat. I nodded and agreed, for the time being.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Of course, nobody enjoys hearing unpleasant things about their family. Satoko was certainly a prankster, and I'd suffered at her hands more than once, but using something like this as ammunition for payback would be far too cruel and underhanded.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: And from the sound of it... Satoshi had been close with Mion and the others too. So perhaps just remembering him was still painful.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh. ...But, Mion--``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Mion, who had been about to turn away, looked back with a slightly annoyed frown. Her expression gave me pause, but there was one more thing I wanted to ask.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``When I asked Rena about Satoshi before, she said... she didn't really know him.@k@vS20/01/440100182. You're the same way--why are you all trying so hard to hide it?@k@vS20/01/440100183. It's not like I'm going to blab about it, and besides--``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: For a single instant.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I thought I saw a fierce, piercing light flash deep within Mion's eyes, and I caught my breath. ...But the next moment it was gone, replaced by a smile so bright it seemed incongruously cheerful.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``That was just a coincidence.@k@vS20/03/440300186. A matter of bad timing, that's all.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Yes, just a coincidence.@k@vS20/03/440300188. There's nothing more to it than that. --Right?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh, yeah...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``So this conversation is over.@k@vS20/03/440300190. --Got it?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: She was smiling, but her eyes held no warmth at all.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Her tone was gentle, yet each word pierced me like a needle.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: And Mion--
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Without waiting for my answer, she walked back into the classroom.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
